---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for CPA2API
title: 'feat: [Brief Feature Description]'
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Problem / Pain Point
Is your feature request related to a problem or limitation? Please describe clearly. E.g., "I'm trying to use LangChain with Qwen, but it fails because..."

## 🎨 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how the proposed feature improves the developer experience, performance, or capability of the gateway.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, API specification links, sample responses, or downstream agent framework requirements here.
